metadata.title: Web Design Pricing 2026 — Custom Quote
metadata.description: No fixed price list: every project is unique. Discover the modular quote system for your landing page, showcase site, e-commerce, web app, CRM or SEO strategy.
metadata.ogDescription: No fixed rates, a formula tailored to your project. Landing page, showcase site, e-commerce, web app and more — free quote.

hero.title: Tailored solutions, not one-size-fits-all pricing
hero.description: Every project is unique. Rather than a price list that fits no one, I offer a modular quote: a solid foundation, and only the options you actually need.

whyNoPrice.title: Why don't I display fixed prices?
whyNoPrice.intro: A website is like a house: the foundations are the same for everyone, but the size, materials and finishes make all the difference to the final budget.

reasons.title: Every project has its own level of complexity
reasons.description: A simple landing page can be delivered in 2 weeks. The same page with complex animations, advanced tracking and 3 languages takes 6 weeks of work. Showing the same price would be misleading.

reasons.title: You only pay for what you need
reasons.description: Why include an online booking system if you don't need one? My modular quote system lets you choose only the features that are useful to your business.

reasons.title: Quality is non-negotiable
reasons.description: I don't offer low-cost packages that sacrifice SEO, performance or accessibility. Every project, large or small, receives the same level of technical rigour.

projects.sectionDescription: From the simplest to the most ambitious, here's what I build — and how each project adapts to your needs and budget.

landingPage.name: Landing page
landingPage.description: A single, high-impact page designed to convert. Perfect for launching a product, testing an offer or promoting an event.

vitrine.name: Showcase website
vitrine.description: The reference site for your business. It presents who you are, what you do and encourages visitors to get in touch.
base: Up to 5 pages (home, services, about, contact…)

multipage.name: Multi-page website
multipage.description: A complete site with an information architecture designed for SEO and user experience. Ideal for businesses with rich services or content.
base: Consistent responsive design across all pages

ecommerce.name: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: A high-performance, secure online shop optimised for sales. From a small artisan catalogue to a large store.

webapp.name: Web app / SaaS
webapp.description: A custom business solution accessible from any browser. To automate a process, centralise data or offer an online service.

mvp.name: MVP / Prototype
mvp.description: Have an idea and want to test it quickly? I build a working prototype to validate your concept before a major investment.

crm.name: CRM / Management software
crm.description: A custom internal management tool: client tracking, business oversight, reporting. Far more flexible than off-the-shelf software.

refonte.name: Website redesign
refonte.description: Is your current site no longer converting, too slow or out of date? I analyse it, rethink it and modernise it while keeping what works.
base: Full audit of the existing site

seo.name: SEO / GEO
seo.description: Being found on Google — and tomorrow on AI engines — requires a strategy. I audit, optimise and build your visibility for the long term.
options: Core Web Vitals and advanced technical SEO

maintenance.name: Maintenance & Support
maintenance.description: Your site stays fast, secure and up to date. I handle updates, backups and ongoing optimisations so you can focus on your business.

items.title: Optimised SEO
items.description: Every page is optimised for search engines: meta tags, semantic structure, performance and local SEO.

items.title: Responsive Design
items.description: Your site adapts perfectly to all screens: mobile, tablet and desktop. Tested across all major browsers.

items.title: Maximum Performance
items.description: Google PageSpeed score above 90. Optimised load times for a smooth user experience.

items.title: Hosting Advice
items.description: Recommendation and setup of the hosting solution best suited to your project and budget.

items.title: GDPR & Legal Pages
items.description: GDPR compliance, privacy policy and legal notices included so you're compliant from day one.

items.title: Training & Independence
items.description: Personalised training to manage your content independently. Documentation and video tutorials included.

items.question: How does the modular quote work?
items.answer: I start from a common base for your project type, then you choose the options you actually need. Each feature has a clear, transparent cost. You approve the quote before I start — no nasty surprises.

items.question: Are there hidden costs or extra fees?
items.answer: No, I have a full transparency policy. The quote covers the entire project. Only hosting (around €10-30/month depending on the solution) and the domain name (around €10-15/year) are recurring costs you pay directly to the provider.

items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
items.answer: Yes, payment is typically split into 3 instalments: 30% deposit on order, 40% on design approval, and 30% on delivery. For larger projects, a custom payment schedule can be arranged.

items.question: How long does it take to deliver my project?
items.answer: Timelines depend on complexity and chosen options. A simple landing page takes 2 to 3 weeks. A full showcase site, 3 to 5 weeks. An e-commerce store or web app, 6 to 12 weeks. The schedule is agreed together from the start.

items.question: What happens after delivery?
items.answer: After delivery, you get 30 days of free support for any questions or minor adjustments. Then I offer monthly maintenance packages to keep your site performing and secure.

cta.title: Let's talk about your project
cta.description: In a few minutes, describe your project and receive a proposal tailored to your needs and budget. No price grid, no surprises.
